title: Why Your Wix Site Is Costing You Clients (and What to Do About It)
excerpt: A DIY Wix or WordPress site might seem cost-effective. In reality, it costs you clients every single week. Here's why — and what to do instead.

content.text: You built your site yourself 3 years ago on Wix. It worked at first — you had a link to give people. But now, prospects who land on it leave. Without leaving their details.
You have 3 seconds. That's the average time a visitor gives a website before deciding whether to stay or leave. On a Wix site built with a generic template, those 3 seconds are lost.
The real cost — let's do the math

Say your site gets 200 visitors a month. If your conversion rate is 0.5%, you get 1 contact per month. A professional site converts at 2-3% — that's 4 to 6 monthly contacts. On a €2,000 service, the difference is €6,000 to €10,000 in additional revenue per month.
Webflow isn't just another website builder. It's the platform used by the best agencies. The difference? Clean code, smooth animations, native SEO, and excellent Core Web Vitals from day one.
Want to see what your site could become? I'll prepare a free mockup within 24h.
